commands: vite remove testnpm2 -D -- --no-audit && cat package.json # should pass when remove not exists package

vite add testnpm2 -- --no-audit && vite add -D test-vite-plus-install -- --no-audit && vite add -O test-vite-plus-package-optional -- --no-audit && cat package.json # should add packages to dependencies
vite remove testnpm2 test-vite-plus-install -- --no-audit && cat package.json # should remove packages from dependencies
vite remove -D test-vite-plus-package-optional -- --loglevel=warn --no-audit && cat package.json # support ignore -O flag and remove package from optional dependencies
vite remove -g testnpm2 -- --dry-run --no-audit && cat package.json # support remove global package with dry-run
